Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Apr-20-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Terrence J. Coleman for plaintiff and opposing party: Carol Tatum
NO OTHER APPEARANCE was stated.

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion for a protective order is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to document categories 18, 19, and 20 as the request is overbroad. The motion is denied as to document categories #1 - 17. The deposition is to be conducted after the completion of the depositions of Rosemary Greene, LaVaughn King, Keevin O'Brien, Lisa O'Brien, Frank Kellum, Jr., and Maurice Tatum at a time mutually convenient to the parties. However, the deposition shall be completed by May 9, 2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
